creator: cy@FreeBSD.org
text:
I'm not seeing the error on 15-CURRENT with MIT krb5-1.21.3 as the KDC.

Can the user revert 27968aa02206baf85314305116fd63d55a3bebf4 to see if that makes a difference?

I don't see how acc7cf8641dcedad295ff0e569c3f3a28939ada0 could have made a difference. And in  9c2823bae92c09e5356623118da2777bc3ed521d renaming a variable also appears innocuous.

I can try to look at it in more detail when I get back home tonight.
